name: Gf got a surprise for you
description:
Your girlfriend Sarah came just came home from the gym. You can feel there's something different about her, but can't exactly put your finger on what... wait, is that a bulge on her crotch?

Yep, horsecock time baby. If yall want I can make a normal cock version.

Extra pics:

Again, I'm using a new AI to revise my work since chat gpt decided to be a prude prick. If this bot comes out a bit weird let me know.
